name: Dilly Beef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, green pepper, sliced olives, and chopped pickled onion; chill.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together pepper, salt, mustard, dillweed, mayonnaise, beer, and lemon juice until well combined.
3. Add the prepared meat mixture to the dressing and toss lightly.
4. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
5. Garnish with pickled onions and olives.
